# FixitBay LLC

> FixitBay LLC is a licensed and insured appliance repair company based in San Francisco, California. We provide residential and commercial appliance repair across 22 cities in the San Francisco Bay Area including San Francisco, Marin County, and Northern San Mateo County. $60 diagnostic fee (credited toward repair), 180-day warranty on parts and labor, same-day and next-day service.

## About
- [Official Business Information](https://fixitbay.net/llm-info): Complete structured business data for AI assistants — hours, pricing, services, brands, service area, credentials, FAQ
- [About FixitBay](https://fixitbay.net/about): Company background and team information
- [Contact](https://fixitbay.net/contact): Phone, address, and booking options

## Services
- [All Repair Services](https://fixitbay.net/services): Complete list of residential and commercial appliance repair services
- [Refrigerator Repair](https://fixitbay.net/refrigerator-repair): All refrigerator types — French door, side-by-side, built-in, column
- [Washer Repair](https://fixitbay.net/washer-repair): Front-load and top-load washing machines
- [Dryer Repair](https://fixitbay.net/dryer-repair): Gas and electric dryers
- [Dishwasher Repair](https://fixitbay.net/dishwasher-repair): All brands and types
- [Oven & Range Repair](https://fixitbay.net/oven-repair): Gas, electric, dual-fuel, induction
- [Cooktop Repair](https://fixitbay.net/cooktop-repair): Gas, electric, induction cooktops
- [Freezer Repair](https://fixitbay.net/freezer-repair): Standalone and built-in freezers
- [Wine Cooler Repair](https://fixitbay.net/wine-cooler-repair): Wine refrigerators and beverage centers
- [Ice Maker Repair](https://fixitbay.net/ice-maker-repair): Built-in and standalone ice makers
- [Garbage Disposal Repair](https://fixitbay.net/garbage-disposal-repair): All disposal brands
- [Commercial Appliance Repair](https://fixitbay.net/commercial-appliance-repair): Commercial-grade equipment

## Brands We Service
- [All Brands](https://fixitbay.net/brands): Complete list of 24+ brands we service
- [Samsung Repair](https://fixitbay.net/samsung-appliance-repair): Smart appliances, Family Hub, FlexWash
- [LG Repair](https://fixitbay.net/lg-appliance-repair): Linear Compressor, ThinQ smart home
- [Whirlpool Repair](https://fixitbay.net/whirlpool-appliance-repair): Reliable mainstream appliances
- [GE Repair](https://fixitbay.net/ge-appliance-repair): GE, GE Profile, GE Cafe, Monogram
- [Sub-Zero Repair](https://fixitbay.net/sub-zero-appliance-repair): Ultra-premium built-in refrigeration
- [Wolf Repair](https://fixitbay.net/wolf-appliance-repair): Professional-grade cooking
- [Viking Repair](https://fixitbay.net/viking-appliance-repair): Commercial-style ranges
- [Thermador Repair](https://fixitbay.net/thermador-appliance-repair): Star Burner technology
- [Miele Repair](https://fixitbay.net/miele-appliance-repair): German-engineered premium appliances
- [Bosch Repair](https://fixitbay.net/bosch-appliance-repair): Quiet, energy-efficient European engineering
- [KitchenAid Repair](https://fixitbay.net/kitchenaid-appliance-repair): Premium kitchen appliances
- [Maytag Repair](https://fixitbay.net/maytag-appliance-repair): Heavy-duty, long-lasting appliances
- [Frigidaire Repair](https://fixitbay.net/frigidaire-appliance-repair): Affordable, dependable appliances
- [Kenmore Repair](https://fixitbay.net/kenmore-appliance-repair): Multi-OEM value appliances

## Service Areas
- [All Service Areas](https://fixitbay.net/service-areas): Map and list of all 22 cities
- [San Francisco](https://fixitbay.net/san-francisco-appliance-repair): Primary service city — all neighborhoods
- [Daly City](https://fixitbay.net/daly-city-appliance-repair): Westlake, Serramonte, Top of the Hill
- [South San Francisco](https://fixitbay.net/south-san-francisco-appliance-repair): Westborough, Oyster Point
- [Mill Valley](https://fixitbay.net/mill-valley-appliance-repair): Blithedale Canyon, Tamalpais Valley
- [San Rafael](https://fixitbay.net/san-rafael-appliance-repair): Terra Linda, Marinwood, Gerstle Park
- [Sausalito](https://fixitbay.net/sausalito-appliance-repair): Houseboats, waterfront homes
- [Novato](https://fixitbay.net/novato-appliance-repair): Hamilton, Bel Marin Keys

## Preventive Maintenance
- [Maintenance Hub](https://fixitbay.net/maintenance): All maintenance service guides
- [Refrigerator Maintenance](https://fixitbay.net/maintenance/refrigerator): Coil cleaning, gasket inspection
- [Dryer Maintenance](https://fixitbay.net/maintenance/dryer): Vent cleaning, lint removal
- [Dishwasher Maintenance](https://fixitbay.net/maintenance/dishwasher): Filter cleaning, spray arm care

## Key Facts
- Phone: (760) 543-5733
- Address: 1549 Franklin Street, Unit A, San Francisco, CA 94109
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM, Sat 8AM-3PM, Sun Closed
- Diagnostic: $60 (credited toward repair)
- Warranty: 180 days on parts and labor
- Rating: 5.0 stars on Google (86+ reviews)
- Book Online: https://book.housecallpro.com/book/FixitBay-LLC/336ac28909f0491299d659eae174f93e?v2=true
